title: Module 1
content:
Introduction To Multimedia – Components of Multimedia, Graphics/Image
Data Types, Popular File Formats , Concepts Of Video-Analog video and
digital video(definitions only), Digital Audio – digitization of sound, Storage
Requirements of Multimedia Applications.
Need For Compression, Elements Of Information Theory, Lossless
Compression, Lossy Compression. Compression performance metrics

title: Module 2
content:
Basic Compression Techniques- Run length encoding-Shannon Fano
Coding –Static Huffman Coding–binary and non binary Huffman coding-
Arithmetic Coding – Dictionary based Coding- LZ77, LZ78 and LZW
compression.

title: Module 3
content:
Audio Compression– µ-law and A-law Companding. Frequency Domain
And Filtering – Basic Sub-Band Coding .MPEG Audio. Speech Compression
Techniques – Linear Predictive Coding (LPC) and Code Excited LPC.

title: Module 4
content:
Image Compression: Fundamentals –– Compression Standards – DCT, JPEG
Standard– Wavelet Based Compression – Implementation Using Filters –
EZW, SPIHT Coders
Video Compression Techniques and Standards–MPEG-1, MPEG-4–Motion
Estimation and Compensation Techniques
